author: danielo515
description: Define forms for capturing data that you will be able to open from anywhere you can run JavaScript.

manifest.author: Danielo Rodriguez
manifest.description: Define forms for filling data that you will be able to open from anywhere you can run JS
manifest.name: Modal forms

name: Modal forms

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features

- feat: support template transformations in FormResult.asString (f0541f8)

## Other Changes

- refactor: hide transformation parsing inside templateParser (780a79f)
- refactor: import shared types from formResultTypes directly (635dbc0)
- refactor: extract ModalFormData/Val types to break source-tree cycle (e2b7293)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes

- fix: return empty string instead of invalid YAML when frontmatter output is empty (bad9a4a)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features

- feat: add `capitalize` template transformation (8a5df22)

## Other Changes

- refactor: use toLocaleUpperCase in capitalized for locale consistency (139edc0)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes

- fix: prevent duplicate selections in multiselect notes source (2a95f92)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features

- feat: expose field name on rendered form fields for CSS targeting (170f43e)

## Bug Fixes

- fix: place data-field-name on .setting-item for toggle and folder fields (920d9d0)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Other Changes

- docs: add cross-links to self-contained forms guide (46c20f0)
- docs: complete the meeting note example with template output (ed9c0ab)
- docs: add guide for self-contained forms in Templater templates (2d61f49)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes

- fix: use notes-file for GitHub release to avoid shell quoting issues (5f63199)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features

- feat: allow multiple folder sources for multiselect notes field (90b5cc1)

## Bug Fixes

- fix: align folder action buttons with input fields in form builder (4d55db6)
- fix: simplify FileSuggest to always use get_tfiles_from_folders (56187a8)

## Other Changes

- refactor: return Separated from get_tfiles_from_folders (ff520cb)
- refactor: use A.separate and A.uniq in get_tfiles_from_folders (e98b9d0)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes

- fix: document that template frontmatter outputs raw YAML without delimiters (2fc7e30)
- fix: add --- delimiters to frontmatter examples in documentation (23bd908)
- fix: wrap frontmatter command output in --- delimiters (5186962)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features

- feat: add required field support to FormBuilder API (38a63a9)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features

- feat: replace release-please with self-contained release pipeline (6b29561)

## Bug Fixes

- fix: improve conventional commits parsing and exclude chores from notes (1ff9e44)
